texto: So many men in my life have tried to “fix me”
autor: they viewed me as a “fiery” being who is in need of taming
explicacao: Citação de they viewed me as a “fiery” being who is in need of taming sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “So many men in my life have tried to “fix me”” articula reflexao, mohadesa-najumi, tried em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
